argus_soc: k-induction proof (mode prove, depth 4, basecase+induction both PASS). 6 safety assertions on WB ack/err, UART TX, SPI/CS/MOSI, PWM0/PWM1. clk2fflogic enabled for EF_WDT32_APB clock gating cell. Vera waiver accepted via kanban comment t_953eb7c3.
12/12 modules have synthesized netlists in rtl-*/synth/
12/12 equiv check logs exist at rtl-*/logs/equiv_check/*_equiv.log. Conditional passes documented for sky130 designs.
0 GLS artifacts across entire stage dir. GLS belongs in Stage 5 Verification.
Script exists and executes. All 12 lint checks PASS, all 12 formal checks PASS.

waiver.scope: argus_soc formal: k-induction proof replaces deep BMC on top-level SoC. 11/12 leaf modules retain BMC depth 20.
waiver.issued_by: Vera (Luqman) via kanban comment on t_953eb7c3, 2026-07-20 09:45
waiver.rationale: Full BMC depth 20 on 50-file SoC is computationally infeasible with Z3 solver. Top-level formal scope is interconnect-safety proof, not functional BMC — leaf modules carry functional verification burden. Assertion-based prove with k-induction is the correct mode for top-level integration formal.
waiver.formal_config: mode prove, depth 4 basecase, clk2fflogic enabled, 6 safety assertions via SV bind

summary: All 10 mandatory frontend checks PASS across 12/12 modules. FIX 1 (argus_soc formal) resolved with k-induction proof + Vera waiver. FIX 2 (GLS artifacts) verified clean. Claude Opus audit ($0.28) confirms PASS. Total audit spend: $2.75 across 7 Claude sessions.
